briefdescription.para: This is a low-level function that reads from the specified register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device.
is the register offset to be read from.

simplesect.para: The 32-bit value of the specified register.
C-style signature: u32 XDpDma_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset

briefdescription.para: This is a low-level function that writes to the specified register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device.
is the register offset to write to.
is the 32-bit data to write to the specified register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XDpDma_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: This is a low-level function that writes to the specified register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device.
is the register offset to write to.
is the 32-bit data to write to the specified register.
is the 32-bit field to which data is to be written

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XDpDma_ReadModifyWrite(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: This header file contains identifiers and low-level driver functions (or macros) that can be used to access the device.

detaileddescription.para: High-level driver functions are defined in xdpdma.h

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 aad 04/12/16 Initial release.
